title: Sir, I admit your general rule,
content:
"Sir, I admit your general rule,
That every poet is a fool.
But you yourself may serve to show it,
Every fool is not a poet."
meaning:
"Sir, I admit your general rule," is a quintessential example of Alexander Pope's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
